description:
Evaluate an HOV (High Occupancy Vehicle) lane policy on the bologna_acosta network using a Python TraCI pipeline. Generate a demand file at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/hov_demand.rou.xml containing 160 standard vehicles (vClass="passenger", id="type_standard") and 40 HOV vehicles (vClass="hov", id="type_hov", color="0,255,0"). Create and run a script at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/run_hov_sim.py that executes a headless simulation using /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/run.sumocfg, dynamically restricting the leftmost lane of all multi-lane edges to HOV traffic only. Calculate the average trip duration for both vehicle classes from the resulting /home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfo.xml and record the values (rounded to two decimal places) in /home/ga/SUMO_Output/hov_analysis.txt using the format:
avg_duration_standard=<value>
avg_duration_hov=<value>
